articles.author: Lauren Forristal
articles.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy - TechCrunch
articles.description: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.
articles.content:
As Apple races to stay competitive in AI while navigating tariffs and supply chain uncertainty, the companys future is about to shift under new leadership.
